# pyproject.toml

Tests for compiling dependencies from `pyproject.toml` and other project files.

## Basic pyproject.toml

### Compile from pyproject.toml

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml -->

Compile dependencies from a `pyproject.toml` file.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml
anyio==3.7.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Dynamic version

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_dynamic_version -->

Projects with dynamic versions still work since dependencies are static.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
dynamic = ["version"]
dependencies = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml
anyio==3.7.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Line-style annotation

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_with_line_annotation -->

The `--annotation-style=line` flag works with pyproject.toml files.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --annotation-style=line
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile --annotation-style=line pyproject.toml
anyio==3.7.0              # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6                 # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1            # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

## Optional dependencies

### Compile extras

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_extra -->

The `--extra` flag selects optional dependencies.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = []
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra foo
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra foo
anyio==3.7.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Extra name normalization

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_extra_name_normalization -->

Extra names are normalized when matching.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = []
optional-dependencies."FrIeNdLy-._.-bArD" = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra "FRiENDlY-...-_-BARd"
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra FRiENDlY-...-_-BARd
anyio==3.7.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### All extras with line annotation

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_all_extras_annotation_line -->

The `--all-extras` flag with `--annotation-style=line` shows the source of each dependency.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = ["anyio==3.7.0"]
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "iniconfig==1.1.1",
]
optional-dependencies.bar = [
    "httpcore==0.18.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile --annotation-style=line pyproject.toml --all-extras
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile --annotation-style=line pyproject.toml --all-extras
anyio==3.7.0              # via httpcore, project (pyproject.toml)
certifi==2024.2.2         # via httpcore
h11==0.14.0               # via httpcore
httpcore==0.18.0          # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6                 # via anyio
iniconfig==1.1.1          # via project (pyproject.toml)
sniffio==1.3.1            # via anyio, httpcore

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Missing extra

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_extra_missing -->

Requesting a non-existent extra raises an error.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = []
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra bar
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Requested extra not found: bar
```

## Poetry support

### Poetry dependencies

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_poetry -->

Poetry-style dependencies are supported.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[tool.poetry]
name = "poetry-editable"
version = "0.1.0"
description = ""
authors = ["Astral Software Inc. <hey@astral.sh>"]

[tool.poetry.dependencies]
python = "^3.10"
anyio = "^3"
pytest = { version = "*", optional = true }

[tool.poetry.extras]
test = ["pytest"]

[build-system]
requires = ["poetry-core"]
build-backend = "poetry.core.masonry.api"
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra test
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra test
anyio==3.7.1
    # via poetry-editable (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
iniconfig==2.0.0
    # via pytest
packaging==24.0
    # via pytest
pluggy==1.4.0
    # via pytest
pytest==8.1.1
    # via poetry-editable (pyproject.toml)
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Poetry with empty project dependencies

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_poetry_empty_dependencies -->

A project section without dependencies is treated as empty.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "poetry-editable"
version = "0.1.0"
description = ""
authors = ["Astral Software Inc. <hey@astral.sh>"]

[tool.poetry]
name = "poetry-editable"
version = "0.1.0"
description = ""
authors = ["Astral Software Inc. <hey@astral.sh>"]

[tool.poetry.dependencies]
python = "^3.10"
anyio = "^3"

[build-system]
requires = ["poetry-core"]
build-backend = "poetry.core.masonry.api"
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml
anyio==3.7.1
    # via poetry-editable (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

## Error handling

### Invalid project name

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_invalid_name -->

Invalid project names are rejected.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "!project"
dependencies = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Failed to parse: `pyproject.toml`
  Caused by: TOML parse error at line 5, column 8
  |
5 | name = "!project"
  |        ^^^^^^^^^^
Not a valid package or extra name: "!project". Names must start and end with a letter or digit and may only contain -, _, ., and alphanumeric characters.
```

### Invalid dependencies format

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_poetry_invalid_dependencies -->

Using a map instead of an array for dependencies fails.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "poetry-editable"
version = "0.1.0"
description = ""
authors = ["Astral Software Inc. <hey@astral.sh>"]

[tool.poetry]
name = "poetry-editable"
version = "0.1.0"
description = ""
authors = ["Astral Software Inc. <hey@astral.sh>"]

[project.dependencies]
python = "^3.12"
msgspec = "^0.18.4"

[tool.poetry.dependencies]
python = "^3.10"
anyio = "^3"

[build-system]
requires = ["poetry-core"]
build-backend = "poetry.core.masonry.api"
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Failed to parse: `pyproject.toml`
  Caused by: TOML parse error at line 13, column 1
   |
13 | [project.dependencies]
   | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
invalid type: map, expected a sequence
```

### Workspace source without workspace

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_eager_validation -->

Using workspace source without a workspace fails early.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "project"
dynamic = ["version"]
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = ["anyio==4.7.0"]

[tool.uv.sources]
anyio = { workspace = true }
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Failed to parse entry: `anyio`
  Caused by: `anyio` references a workspace in `tool.uv.sources` (e.g., `anyio = { workspace = true }`), but is not a workspace member
```

## Setup files

### Compile setup.cfg with extras

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_setup_cfg -->

Compile dependencies from a `setup.cfg` file with extras.

```cfg setup.cfg
[options]
packages = find:
install_requires=
    anyio

[options.extras_require]
dev =
    iniconfig; python_version >= "3.7"
    mypy; python_version <= "3.8"
```

```python setup.py
# setup.py
from setuptools import setup


setup(
    name="dummypkg",
    description="A dummy package",
)
```

```console
$ uv pip compile setup.cfg --extra dev
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile setup.cfg --extra dev
anyio==4.3.0
    # via dummypkg (setup.cfg)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
iniconfig==2.0.0
    # via dummypkg (setup.cfg)
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```

### Compile setup.py

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_setup_py -->

Compile dependencies from a `setup.py` file.

```python setup.py
# setup.py
from setuptools import setup


setup(
    name="dummypkg",
    description="A dummy package",
    install_requires=["anyio"],
)
```

```console
$ uv pip compile setup.py
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile setup.py
anyio==4.3.0
    # via dummypkg (setup.py)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Compile pyproject.toml with setuptools backend

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_setuptools -->

Compile dependencies from a `pyproject.toml` with setuptools build backend.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"
```

```cfg setup.cfg
[options]
packages = find:
install_requires=
    anyio

[options.extras_require]
dev =
    iniconfig; python_version >= "3.7"
    mypy; python_version <= "3.8"
```

```python setup.py
# setup.py
from setuptools import setup


setup(
    name="dummypkg",
    description="A dummy package",
)
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev
anyio==4.3.0
    # via dummypkg (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
iniconfig==2.0.0
    # via dummypkg (pyproject.toml)
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```
